description: Gradle build configuration script for an Android application module in a Flutter project, defining plugins, Android build settings, and Flutter-specific configurations.

methods.name: plugins {}
methods.description: Defines Gradle plugins applied to the module.

methods.name: android {}
methods.description: Configures Android build parameters such as namespace, SDK versions, build types, and compile options.

methods.name: compileOptions {}
methods.description: Sets Java source and target compatibility versions.

methods.name: kotlinOptions {}
methods.description: Sets JVM target version for Kotlin compilation.

methods.name: defaultConfig {}
methods.description: Specifies application ID, SDK versions, and app version info.

methods.name: buildTypes {}
methods.description: Configures build types, including release signing configuration.

methods.name: flutter {}
methods.description: Configures Flutter-specific settings, such as source directory.
